## PM-466 ŌĆö connect-calendar agenda: finished sessions drop off so the next session in the day surfaces (2026-06-04)

Dean's call on connect-calendar.html: the agenda Upcoming list split future-vs-past by DAY (`rowDayStart >= todayStart`), so today's already-finished sessions stayed in today's group (dimmed) and cluttered the top of the calendar. Changed the split to each occurrence's END time ŌĆö a session is Upcoming while `endMs > nowMs` (covers still-to-come AND live-now, which sits within [starts_at, ends_at]); once finished (`now >= ends_at`) it moves to the 'Show past' section. ends_at fallback `startMs + 20min` for any null-duration row (calendar has real durations since PM-459). NOT deleted ŌĆö finished rows stay reachable in Show-past with the PM-454 'Watch replay' click-through. The existing 30s `render()` ticker (visible-only) re-runs the split, so sessions roll off the Upcoming list automatically as they end, not just on reload. `todayStart` local dropped (now unused in renderAgenda).

Scope: agenda view only. Month grid + month-detail still treat 'past' at day granularity (`startOfDay(d) < todayStart`) ŌĆö correct for a calendar grid; tapping a specific day shows its full schedule incl. what already aired. Easy follow-up if Dean wants month-detail to hide finished-today too.

Ship `68d00f3a` (vyve-site, 4-file atomic: connect-calendar.html + index/settings vbb 338ŌåÆ339 + sw.js `vyve-cache-v2026-06-04-pm466-calendar-drop-finished-a`), all 4 md5-verified at commit SHA; renderAgenda fragment + sw.js passed `node --check`. **PM collision caught by ┬¦23.25:** drafted as PM-465 but the cross-repo scan found a parallel brain session had already claimed PM-465 (replays populated) ŌĆö re-swept to PM-466 before commit. No vyve-site drift (HEAD `945020f0`). No new ┬¦23 rule. Composio still down ŌĆö Vault PAT + Git Data API (┬¦23.27).

## PM-465 ŌĆö Replays populated + replay-pipeline hardening: duration guard, hourly refresh, junk cleanup (2026-06-04)

**Symptom:** Dean ŌĆö "none of the videos have gone into replay pages"; "we live streamed to YouTube but it should then save to the playlist after."

**Root cause:** `replay_videos` empty ŌåÆ replay pages blank. Replays mirror 8 YouTube playlists via `refresh-replay-videos` (reads `replay_playlists`, upserts `replay_videos`). Refresher ran clean at 03:30 but every playlist `video_count=0` ŌåÆ playlists genuinely empty. `session-publish` DOES add each broadcast to its category playlist at pre-create (best-effort) and it had worked for today's two live sessions ŌĆö they were already in the playlists; the refresher just hadn't run since they aired (was daily 03:30). Older back-catalogue was never added (best-effort insert failed/predated) AND is mostly dead anyway.

**Findings (backfill dry-run):** 21 broadcast IDs ŌåÆ only 4 genuine watchable: today's Yoga Flexibility `9b-xSEfEIKc` (51m) + Calming Breathwork `-LanVrrQGPA` (18.5m) already in playlists, plus older Yoga `d-dNe6W-o4I` (51m) + Mindfulness `24JKB3ufM4k` (18m48s). Rest: 10 deleted from YouTube, 5 zero-duration (P0D) shells (broken-autostart era), 1 PUBLIC "Big Buck Bunny" test `aqz-KE-bpKQ`, 1 dev-test "PM-327 Device Walk" `JEFNPGKhQqY`.

**Shipped:**
- `refresh-replay-videos` v4 ŌĆö duration guard (skip `duration_sec<=0` / P0D). Pre-created/not-yet-aired + live-unfinished broadcasts no longer surface as 0-sec replays. Verified live: upcoming `URgCwDw4Y2g` held back.
- Cron: `vyve-refresh-replay-videos-daily` (jobid 26, 03:30) unscheduled ŌåÆ `vyve-refresh-replay-videos-hourly` (jobid 36, `45 * * * *`). Replays refresh within ~1h of a session ending.
- `replay-playlist-backfill` EF (new, verify_jwt:false, `?dry=1`) ŌĆö idempotent eligibility-guarded curated backfill (on-YouTube + unlisted + real duration + non-test title). Added the 2 genuine older recordings.
- Nulled 16 junk `youtube_broadcast_id`s in `calendar_occurrences` (10 deleted, 5 P0D shells, Big Buck Bunny). Kept genuine + legit-upcoming + dev-test record.
- Ran refresher ŌåÆ `replay_videos` = 4 (2 Yoga, 2 Mindfulness), zero junk.

**HARD RULE:** ┬¦23.91 (refines ┬¦23.90).

**Open:** consider moving playlist-insert pre-create ŌåÆ broadcast-completion; replay "latest" ordering uses playlist-add time not air time; `replay-playlist-backfill` retained as a tool.

## PM-463 ŌĆö connect Live This Week carousel now reads the real calendar_occurrences schedule (mirrors home) (2026-06-04)

connect.html: rewrote `renderLiveThisWeek()` to mirror the home carousel `paintLiveCarousel()` (PM-453/455/456). Was: static `window.VYVE_SESSIONS` (sessions-data.js) only ŌĆö fixed per-category thumbnails (`thumb-yoga.jpg` etc), generic recurring types, `url('/'+s.thumb)`. Now: static sessions-data.js FIRST paint (never blank on cold boot, ┬¦23.47) then upgrades to the real upcoming schedule from Dexie `calendar_occurrences` ŌĆö actual `session_title`, `host_name`, per-occurrence `image_url` thumbnail, currently-live row (`starts_at<=now<ends_at && youtube_broadcast_id`) floated to the front and flagged `ŌŚÅ LIVE`. Window = next 7 days, max 8 cards; filtered to `type==='live_session'` (events stay in the separate "What's on" calendar tile below, `renderCalendarTile`). Routes by category via a local `LIVE_PAGE_BY_CATEGORY` map (identical 8-category map to index `CATEGORY_LIVE_PAGE`).

Two traps respected, both proven on the home carousel: (1) **┬¦23.87** ŌĆö `calendar_occurrences` is a `makeCatalogueTable()` store, read via `.allFor(null)` NOT `.all()` (the latter throws ŌåÆ silent static fallback = the PM-455 bug). (2) **PM-456** ŌĆö `image_url` is ROOT-RELATIVE (`/assets/hosts/*.jpg`); the thumb builder leaves leading-slash / http(s) paths intact and prepends `/` ONLY for bare-filename static thumbs ŌĆö prepending to a root-relative value gives `//assets/..` = broken protocol-relative host (the exact PM-456 regression Dean flagged pre-emptively).

Upgrade path = static-first + bounded retry (6├Ś1.5s, single-chain `__liveCarouselUpgrading` guard so the foreground-repaint paintAll() calls don't stack chains) AND `renderLiveThisWeek()` added to the existing `vyve-localdb-table-pulled` subscriber so the strip repaints the moment sync.js hydrates the calendar. Added `.next-tag`/`.next-tag.live` pill CSS (copied verbatim from index.html) for the live flag; connect's `.scroll-card` look otherwise untouched ŌĆö 84px thumb left as-is, PM-457's 120px home bump deliberately NOT carried over (Dean: change the feed + thumbnail source, not the look).

Ship `d1c2d49f` (vyve-site, 4-file atomic: connect.html + index/settings vbb 336ŌåÆ337 + sw.js `vyve-cache-v2026-06-04-pm463-connect-live-carousel-calendar-a`), all 4 md5-verified at commit SHA; extracted function passed `node --check`. No drift (HEAD `af28875` unchanged session-startŌåÆcommit; cross-repo PM scan vyve-site max 457 / brain 462 ŌåÆ 463). **No new ┬¦23 rule** ŌĆö a clean re-application of ┬¦23.87 + the PM-456 url-builder lesson. Composio still down ŌĆö Vault PAT + Git Data API throughout (┬¦23.27).

Note: connect Live This Week + home are now BOTH calendar_occurrences-driven with sessions-data.js as cold-boot fallback only ŌĆö a step toward the PM-211 single-source-of-truth retirement of sessions-data.js.

## PM-462 ŌĆö Live 'box' operational runbook finalised: Mac set never-sleep on mains; fully hands-off (2026-06-04)

The simulated-live pipeline is now fully hands-off on Dean's Mac as the interim 24/7 box. Power/run config locked this session:
- launchd daemon `com.vyve.live-runner` (PM-460) + `caffeinate -i` in the plist holds the system awake while the runner runs.
- `sudo pmset -c sleep 0` applied ŌĆö system sleep on AC/charger = NEVER (belt-and-braces over caffeinate). The pmset warning about the Battery profile is benign and irrelevant (box stays on mains).
- RUN RULE for Dean: plugged into mains + lid OPEN. Screen may be dimmed/black or display-sleep ŌĆö display sleep != system sleep and does NOT stop the runner. Closing the lid (clamshell) DOES sleep the Mac and would miss sessions.
- cron 27 OFF (PM-460); daemon is sole broadcast owner.

Behaviour: the daemon airs every scheduled session automatically, in order, through the end of the current calendar (2 Jul). After 2 Jul it idles until fresh calendar_occurrences rows are added (calendar-regeneration helper still owed). New master mp4s go in `~/vyve-live/media`.

First UNATTENDED air = 4 Jun 07:00 BST (Yoga Flexibility). Dean won't be up; Lewis to open the app 06:50ŌĆō07:05 on the yoga live page and confirm: pre-roll 'Going live soon' (not blank) -> 'Live now' + player at ~07:00 -> correct title/host; screenshot + flag if stuck/blank past ~07:02. Last unproven sliver = the front-end live:true flip.

Full 4 JunŌĆō2 Jul schedule (112 sessions; 4 daily slots 07:00/08:30/13:00/19:30 UK; Yoga + Mindfulness only) shared with Alan + Lewis this session.

## PM-461 ŌĆö Replay pages wiped to a clean slate (11 YouTube videos deleted, all 8 playlists emptied, mirror zeroed); live-page + playlist-routing wiring verified (2026-06-04)

Ahead of tomorrow's first real sessions, cleared ALL pre-launch test content from the replay pages. The replay surfaces MIRROR the per-category YouTube playlists (replay_playlists.youtube_playlist_id -> replay_videos via a daily refresh cron ~03:30), so the clear was done at the YouTube SOURCE: videos.delete on 11 underlying test videos (all 204), playlistItems.delete on all 17 items across the 8 playlists (incl. 6 'Deleted video' ghosts and today's test VOD qOmK6vZeTKo ŌĆö closes that backlog item). All 8 playlists verified empty (group-therapy showed a lingering item once = API propagation lag, cleared on recheck). Then zeroed the DB mirror (DELETE FROM replay_videos; replay_playlists video_count=0 + latest_* NULL + last_refreshed_at=now) so the pages read empty immediately, not at the next cron. EMPTY REPLAY PAGES ARE NOW EXPECTED until sessions air from 4 Jun ŌĆö not a bug. New hard rule ┬¦23.90.

Playlist auto-routing CONFIRMED (Dean's Q): vyve-live-runner.py playlistItems.inserts each broadcast into its category's youtube_playlist_id at broadcast creation (runner ~L315). So every aired session lands in the right per-category playlist on its own, the refresh cron pulls it into replay_videos, and replays backfill automatically ŌĆö no manual step.

Live-page wiring VERIFIED (the 'will it flip / not go blank' question): all 8 category pages (yoga/mindfulness/workouts/checkin/therapy/events/education -live.html + podcast) + matching -rp.html exist. The two scheduled categories target their EXACT DB category strings ŌĆö yoga-live.html category='Yoga, Pilates & Stretch', mindfulness-live.html category='Mindfulness & Mindset'. session-live.js = 6-state engine (UPCOMING / PRE_ROLL / LIVE / JUST_ENDED / QUIET / QUIET_WITHIN_WINDOW); every state renders a populated view (countdown -> 'Going live soon' -> embedded autoplay player -> 'Just ended' -> 'Replay'); effectiveState() reconciles clock vs broadcast-status probe with fail-safes (probe down -> fall back to clock; never a premature LIVE). Cold-boot safe: reads Dexie via .allFor(null) AND fetches calendar_occurrences direct from Supabase REST filtered by category, and re-renders on the vyve-localdb-table-pulled bus event ŌĆö so never blank pre-sync. Only unproven sliver: the live:true flip at a real pre-roll (gated to the 10-min window) ŌĆö Lewis to eyeball 4 Jun 06:50ŌĆō07:05 on the yoga live page.

## PM-460 ŌĆö Always-on runner installed (launchd) + cron 27 off; runner relocated out of ~/Desktop (macOS TCC) (2026-06-04)

The simulated-live runner now runs unattended on Dean's Mac as a launchd LaunchAgent (`com.vyve.live-runner`, plist at `~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.vyve.live-runner.plist`): RunAtLoad + KeepAlive, wrapped in `/usr/bin/caffeinate -i` (no idle-sleep while running), executing `/usr/bin/python3` (Xcode CLT 3.9) on the runner in daemon mode (no `--once`). Confirmed healthy: `launchctl list` shows a live PID + exit 0; log `daemon up. refresh=60s horizon=900s media_dir='/Users/deanbrown/vyve-live/media'`.

**macOS TCC gotcha (new ┬¦23.89).** The first install pointed at `~/Desktop/Lives` and died instantly with `operation not permitted` on BOTH the env file and the .py. launchd LaunchAgents have NO access to the TCC-protected ~/Desktop / ~/Documents / ~/Downloads and cannot be prompted (it worked when Dean ran it by hand because interactive Terminal carries the user's TCC grant). Fix: relocated the whole working set OUT of Desktop to `~/vyve-live` (not TCC-protected) ŌĆö runner `~/vyve-live/vyve-live-runner.py`, env `~/vyve-live/vyve-runner.env` (chmod 600), masters moved `~/Desktop/VYVE LIVES` ŌåÆ `~/vyve-live/media` (instant, same volume; the hosts/ subfolder came along, all 5 cards present), log `~/vyve-live/runner.log`. VYVE_MEDIA_DIR updated; host cards resolve at `~/vyve-live/media/hosts`. **New master mp4s now go in `~/vyve-live/media`, not the Desktop.**

**cron 27 (`session-publish-hourly`, `5 * * * *`) deactivated** via `cron.alter_job(27, active:=false)` ŌĆö the daemon is now the sole owner of broadcast creation. Reversible (`active:=true`). Note: the cron only pre-created broadcasts, it never aired them (autostart dead on the channel), so it was never an airing fallback ŌĆö only the daemon airs.

Daemon logs 8x `SKIP: notes is empty (no master filename)` per scan ŌĆö confirmed these are the **40 stale pre-re-curation rows** (22 MayŌĆō2 Jun, all PAST, active=true, empty notes). All **112 upcoming** live_session rows carry their master filename, so nothing real is skipped. Deactivating the 40 stale rows is still owed (also silences the SKIP noise).

First unattended air = **4 Jun 07:00 BST** (Yoga Flexibility). Mac must stay plugged in + lid open ŌĆö `caffeinate -i` stops idle-sleep but NOT lid-close/clamshell sleep, and a sleeping Mac won't air. Real long-term home is a 24/7 box (systemd unit in repo). SECURITY unchanged from PM-459: the exposed service_role key now also sits in `~/vyve-live/vyve-runner.env` ŌĆö rotation still owed.

## PM-459 ŌĆö Simulated-live FIRST REAL AIR proven live + calendar card/duration/thumbnail fixes (2026-06-04)

**Headline: the runner aired a real, branded, live YouTube broadcast end-to-end.** `vyve-live-runner.py` on Dean's Mac (runner in `~/Desktop/Lives`, masters `~/Desktop/VYVE LIVES`, host cards `ŌĆ”/VYVE LIVES/hosts`), `--once 0be49b96-eec2-4c06-9e01-762e10c39118` (Yoga Flexibility, the 4 Jun 07:00 occ), `--dry-run` dropped: minted broadcast `qOmK6vZeTKo`, uploaded `alex.jpg` via thumbnails.set (logged OK ŌåÆ custom thumbnails ARE enabled on the channel, no 403), ffmpeg-pushed, stream went active, `broadcast qOmK6vZeTKo -> LIVE`, and CAS-wrote `youtube_broadcast_id=qOmK6vZeTKo` back to the occurrence. Dean confirmed live on YouTube (watch?v=qOmK6vZeTKo). Run was ~00:43 BST, ~7h pre-schedule (under `--once` the start time is ignored). The in-app live page did NOT flip ŌĆö correct: early-go-live is gated to the 10-min pre-roll, so 7h out it isn't surfaced. So the YouTube + broadcast-status + write-back halves of build #1 are proven against reality; the front-end `effectiveState()` `live:true` flip is the one sliver still only exercisable at a real pre-roll (07:00). Post-test tidy: Dean Ctrl-C'd the push; CLEARED `youtube_broadcast_id` back to NULL on the occ so the real 7am mints fresh (a finished broadcast can't re-air). Short test VOD left on the channel to delete in Studio.

**Calendar thumbnails were blank ŌåÆ image_url made root-relative.** PM-451 set absolute `https://online.vyvehealth.co.uk/assets/hosts/<card>.jpg`; absolute remote URLs don't resolve in the local-first shell (working convention is service_catalogue's `/thumb-*.jpg`). UPDATE'd all 116 active rows to root-relative `/assets/hosts/<card>.jpg` ŌåÆ calendar cards render. KNOCK-ON: regressed the PM-453 home carousel (its thumb builder prepended `/` ŌåÆ `//assets/...`), fixed in parallel by PM-456. image_url is root-relative going forward; url() builders must leave a leading-slash path intact.

**connect-calendar cards (vyve-site PM-454, `3be3cf8f`, marker 333 / cache pm454).** (1) 16:9 thumbnails ŌĆö `.oc-thumb` was 62px square `object-fit:cover`, square-cropping the 1280x720 cards; now `width:104px;aspect-ratio:16/9`. (2) Tap-to-expand description panel (accordion; `state.expanded` survives the 30s ticker; delegated click on document covers agenda + month-detail). (3) Click-through CTA by status: liveŌåÆ`/{slug}-live.html` "Join live now", upcomingŌåÆ"Open session", pastŌåÆ`/{slug}-rp.html` "Watch replay"; `LIVE_PAGE_SLUG` maps all 8 categories. Only connect-calendar reads per-occurrence image_url in-app; sessions.html + connect "Live This Week" use static sessions-data.js thumbs. Card title still reads `row.name` not `session_title` ŌĆö parked.

**Durations backfilled to real master lengths.** `ends_at` was a flat 20-min on the 40 Mindfulness rows (Yoga already varied). ffprobe'd every master on Dean's Mac, matched to `notes` by normalised filename, UPDATE'd `ends_at = starts_at + real duration` for all 116 active rows. Now 26 distinct lengths 2ŌĆō51 min, 0 null / 0 ends<=starts. Also tightens session-live.js JUST_ENDED.

**Explainers removed.** Deactivated 4 occurrences (What Is Meditation x2, What Is Breathework, Why Is a Sleep Routine Important) ŌĆö sub-3-min explainer clips, not wanted as scheduled live sessions. Active future calendar now **112**.

**Runner thumbnail patch (VYVEBrain, took PM-456 ŌĆö collided with a parallel home-carousel PM-456, labels only) + Python fix (PM-458).** `thumb_for` now derives the YouTube thumbnail from the occ's `image_url` basename (resolved in `VYVE_HOSTCARD_DIR`, default `<THUMB_DIR>/hosts`) ŌåÆ YouTube == in-app card, auto-follows any type<->per-host remap; falls back to the per-master frame card. `image_url` added to both selects; README + env updated. PM-458: converted `\u2014`/`\u2026` escapes to literal chars ŌĆö the runner had a backslash inside an f-string EXPRESSION, a SyntaxError on Python <3.12 (Dean's Mac = Xcode system python3 **3.9**); the 3.12 container py_compile did NOT catch it. New hard rule ┬¦23.88.

**SECURITY ŌĆö service_role key exposed.** During runner setup Dean pasted the project `service_role` JWT (legacy, exp 2036) into the assistant chat. Treat as compromised: rotate (Supabase reset JWT secret ŌĆö also rotates `anon`) and update every consumer (EF secrets, runner env, clients). NOT done in-session (would break the live system mid-go-live). In blockers/backlog.

**Remaining to hands-off live:** run the daemon ŌĆö leave `python3 vyve-live-runner.py` in a terminal, or install `com.vyve.live-runner.plist` (launchd) for unattended/reboot-safe (needs the key in an env file, not just a session export) ŌĆö then turn OFF `session-publish-hourly` (cron jobid 27) once the box solely owns creation. 41 stale pre-re-curation rows still active.

## PM-456 ŌĆö Fix: home carousel thumbnails blank (image_url went root-relative) (2026-06-03)

After PM-455 the home carousel showed correct titles/times/hosts but blank thumbnails. Cause: a parallel session (vyve-site commit tagged `pm454-calendar-card-thumb-desc`) normalised `calendar_occurrences.image_url` from the absolute `https://online.vyvehealth.co.uk/assets/hosts/<card>.jpg` I set in PM-451 to a **root-relative** `/assets/hosts/<card>.jpg`. The PM-453 carousel thumb builder did `src = /^https?:\/\//.test(thumb) ? thumb : ('/' + thumb)` ŌĆö for a value already starting with `/`, it prepended a second slash ŌåÆ `//assets/hosts/alex.jpg`, a protocol-relative URL resolving to host `assets` ŌåÆ load fails ŌåÆ blank. (The images themselves serve fine: live `GET /assets/hosts/alex.jpg` ŌåÆ 200; CSS/escapeHTML all fine ŌĆö verified.)

Fix (vyve-site commit `63c73dbdeeff77a3bfa21b7cc9d87bcdc0476a52`, PM-456): builder is now `src = (/^https?:\/\//.test(thumb) || thumb.charAt(0) === '/') ? thumb : ('/' + thumb)` ŌĆö leaves both absolute and root-relative paths intact, still prepends `/` only for bare filenames (the static sessions-data.js `thumb-yoga.jpg` path). Lock-step bump: marker ŌåÆ Update 335; cache ŌåÆ `vyve-cache-v2026-06-03-pm456-carousel-thumb-rooturl-fix-a`. 3 files md5-verified; function passed `node --check`.

Note for future: `calendar_occurrences.image_url` is root-relative (`/assets/hosts/..`) going forward (a parallel session's normalisation). Any CSS `url()` builder consuming it must NOT prepend a slash. Cross-session data-shape drift like this is why the brain is canonical ŌĆö re-read the live row shape before assuming.

## PM-455 ŌĆö Fix: home carousel was silently falling back to the static list (2026-06-03)

Dean reported the home page still showed the old generic movement sessions with no calendar timings after PM-453. Root cause: the PM-453 `renderFromCalendar()` read the local calendar via `VYVELocalDB.calendar_occurrences.all()`, but `calendar_occurrences` is a `makeCatalogueTable()` store which exposes `.allFor()` (and `replaceForMember`/`upsert`), NOT `.all()`. The `.all()` call threw `TypeError`, the function's own try/catch returned `false`, and `paintLiveCarousel` fell straight through to the static `sessions-data.js` render ŌĆö so the carousel always showed the eight generic cards and never the real schedule. The bug was copied from the dead no-op `paintWhatsNext`, where it had never executed.

Fix (vyve-site commit `0a2427512c1356e39da93a9c74604256f340efbc`, PM-455): `renderFromCalendar()` now calls `.allFor(null)` ŌĆö matching the working consumer in sessions.html (`readActiveBroadcasts`). Change scoped to the renderFromCalendar span only (the no-op paintWhatsNext still contains the dead `.all()` line; untouched). Lock-step bump: index.html + settings.html vbb-marker ŌåÆ Update 334; sw.js CACHE_NAME ŌåÆ `vyve-cache-v2026-06-03-pm455-home-carousel-allfor-fix-a` (parallel session had taken pm454-calendar-card-thumb-desc + marker 333). 3 files md5-verified; extracted function passed `node --check`.

New hard rule ┬¦23.87: catalogue (makeCatalogueTable) Dexie stores expose `.allFor()`, never `.all()`; a wrong accessor throws and, inside a try/catch fallback, degrades the surface silently. Read catalogue stores via `.allFor(null)`; log caught errors in fallback paths.

Still gated for Dean to actually see it: his device must load the new index.html (remote cache refresh / OTA depending on bundled-vs-dev-loop) AND the catalogue sync must have hydrated calendar_occurrences into Dexie (sync.js pulls all active rows, select=*, no date filter ŌåÆ replaceForMember). On cold boot the static list shows briefly then the bounded retry (6├Ś1.5s) upgrades to the real schedule.

## PM-453 ŌĆö Home live carousel reads the real upcoming schedule (2026-06-03)

vyve-site (commit `44de2cf996b76a1c71446e1c4ba3fc0a9eb5bc8c`): rewrote `paintLiveCarousel()` in index.html so the home "live sessions this week" carousel reads the actual upcoming sessions from `calendar_occurrences` (Dexie store `VYVELocalDB.calendar_occurrences`) instead of the hardcoded `sessions-data.js` catalogue. Renders the same `.scroll-card` markup (background-image thumb from `image_url`, category, `session_title`, day/time + host sub-line; currently-live rows ŌĆö `starts_at<=now<ends_at && youtube_broadcast_id` ŌĆö float to the front with a "ŌŚÅ LIVE" tag). Window = next 7 days, max 8 cards. `image_url` is absolute (https://online.vyvehealth.co.uk/assets/hosts/*.jpg) so the thumb builder skips the leading-slash prefix for http(s) srcs. Cold-boot safety preserved: if the Dexie calendar is empty (not yet synced) it falls back to the static `sessions-data.js` render exactly as before, then sets a bounded retry (6├Ś1.5s) to auto-upgrade to the real schedule once Dexie hydrates ŌĆö never blank (the PM-333 concern). `paintWhatsNext` stays a no-op.

## 2026-06-03 PM-447 ŌĆö token-health monitor (build #3) LIVE + simulated-live drift correction

Build #3 of the simulated-live go-live shipped. New EF `youtube-token-health` v1 (verify_jwt:false) + pg_cron job 35 (`youtube-token-health-daily`, `0 4 * * *`). Reads the YouTube OAuth creds from Vault, attempts a refresh-token grant, then does one cheap authed call (`channels.list?part=id&mine=true`) to confirm the access token is actually usable ŌĆö not just minted. On ANY failure it emails a branded alert to team@vyvehealth.co.uk via `send-email` (Brevo, service-role Bearer); sends NOTHING when healthy. Modes: `{}` normal, `{check:'alert-dryrun'}` (build+return payload, send nothing), `{check:'alert-test'}` (force-send, manual only). Rationale: YOUTUBE_OAUTH_REFRESH_TOKEN is in Google "Testing" mode (~7-day expiry) ŌĆö a silent lapse darkens session-publish + vyve-live-runner + broadcast-status with no warning; this is the tripwire. Verified by real invocation: normal probe healthy:true (vault+refresh+authed call all pass, no email), alert-dryrun returns the team@ payload (html 794b, sent:false). Real send branch unexercised (would email team@) ŌĆö left for Dean's go.

**Drift corrected (flagged PM-445).** master ┬¦5 streaming row, ┬¦ simulated-live model, and ┬¦23.66 still said `session-publish` v2 / `enableAutoStart=true`. Reality since PM-439: v5, autostart DEAD on this channel, worker/runner drives ready->live and live->complete explicitly. All three corrected this commit.

**Three builds now done:** #1 live-page probe (PM-445, shipped+verified bar the live:true device walk), #2 runner version-controlled (PM-446, smoke-test pending on Dean's Mac), #3 token monitor (PM-447, live). Remaining on the workstream is Dean-side: the `--once --dry-run` then live proof on the Mac for 4 Jun 07:00, then turn OFF session-publish-hourly (job 27); plus the 41 stale calendar rows cleanup and the host/description content fill (Lewis/Dean).

## 2026-06-03 PM-445 ŌĆö *-live.html broadcast-status probe: broadcast-live overrides the clock (┬¦23.65 RESOLVED)

Build #1 of the simulated-live go-live (live-page status probe) shipped. The 8 `*-live.html` shells decided LIVE on clock alone (`now >= starts_at`); with autostart dead + worker-driven transitions the page embedded/autoplayed/bound player-tracker before YouTube actually put the broadcast live, and dropped LIVE at the `ends_at` clock during an over-run.

**New EF `broadcast-status` v1 (verify_jwt:true).** OAuth refresh->access (same creds as session-publish) -> `liveBroadcasts.list?part=status` -> maps `lifeCycleStatus` to `{live:bool|null,status}`: live only for `live`; `complete`/`revoked`->complete; `ready`/`created`/`testing`/`testStarting`/`liveStarting`->upcoming; id-not-on-channel->none. CORS+OPTIONS. On YouTube/token failure returns HTTP 200 `{live:null}` so the client treats it as unknown and clock-falls-back (no noisy 500s on the ~12s poll). Uses OAuth not a standalone API key (none in Vault; minting one is a GCP-console action). OAuth coupling is bounded by the front-end fail-safe; build #3 token monitor covers the lapse case. Verified by real invocation: 3 leftover broadcasts all `ready`->live:false, bogus id->none. **`live:true` branch unexercised until a real push.**

**session-live.js** (vyve-site `06af8c81`, 4-file atomic, vbb 325->326, cache pm445). `probeBroadcastStatus()` (throttle 10s, fresh 60s) + `effectiveState()` layered over the clock state machine in `tick()` and the QUIET_WITHIN_WINDOW fallback-merge path. Rules: PRE_ROLL clock + confirmed live -> LIVE (early go-live); LIVE clock + confirmed live -> LIVE; LIVE clock + confirmed not-live -> JUST_ENDED if it had aired else hold PRE_ROLL; LIVE clock + probe errored -> LIVE (fail-safe == old behaviour); LIVE clock + not-yet-probed -> hold PRE_ROLL (never premature LIVE); JUST_ENDED clock + still live -> LIVE (over-run). player-tracker + wake-lock key off EFFECTIVE LIVE only. PRE_ROLL video countdown clamps to "Starting shortly" past start.

**Live DB note.** `calendar_occurrences` = 157 active = 116 re-curated (4 JunŌĆō2 Jul) + 41 stale pre-re-curation rows (22 MayŌĆō3 Jun, old 5-category scheme) still active. Cleanup candidate before public eyes; not a 4-Jun blocker. `youtube_broadcast_id` confirmed runtime-written (null on all upcoming; only pipeline-proving leftovers carry one).

**Tooling.** Composio GitHub down (no active connection in session) ŌĆö Vault PAT + Git Data API throughout (┬¦23.27). ┬¦23.24 PM scan: vyve-site 444, brain 439, capacitor 412 -> PM-445. Commit fresh-pulled all 4 files + re-derived edits on fresh base (anchor==1 drift guard), ┬¦23.21 HEAD+blob-sha gate before force:false PATCH, ┬¦23.30 md5-verify all 4 at commit SHA ŌĆö match.

**Next.** Build #2 runner box (vyve-live-runner.py + ffmpeg + systemd; interim Dean's Mac; prove 4 Jun 07:00 with --once --dry-run, then live; turn OFF session-publish hourly cron once box owns creation). Build #3 token-health monitor (daily pg_net refresh probe -> Brevo alert on invalid_grant).

## 2026-06-02 PM-439 Simulated-live go-live: pipeline PROVEN end-to-end; autostart DEAD on channel -> worker-driven transitions; runner + rename built

**Pipeline proven (real push, then cleaned up).** Mac ffmpeg -re -> reusable YouTube stream key -> bound liveBroadcast -> transition live -> transition complete -> playlistItems.insert -> refresh-replay-videos -> row in replay_videos -> app Replays. Test broadcasts (kXM0vq-YLgg, 9AbXyUdhQOs, lzuTWMja3RY), the test occurrence, the test replay row and a dangling "Deleted video" playlist item all deleted afterwards. Replays left at 12 pre-existing playlist videos (brain had it empty post-PM-410 ŌĆö flagged, untouched).

**Autostart is broken on this channel (root cause, costly to find).** `enableAutoStart:true` never transitions ready->live regardless of monitor on/off, fresh vs stale ingest, or stream health; manual transition while autostart=true returns 403 invalidTransition. WORKING MODEL: create with enableAutoStart=false + monitorStream.enableMonitorStream=false + enableAutoStop=false (DVR/recordFromStart on), then POST liveBroadcasts/transition?broadcastStatus=live once the bound stream reads streamStatus=active, and ?broadcastStatus=complete when the push ends. **┬¦23.85 candidate (promote to hard rule next careful master pass):** on this channel autostart is non-functional ŌĆö broadcasts must be driven live/complete explicitly by the pusher; session-publish must mint autostart=false.

**Shipped/created.** session-publish redeployed to v5 (Supabase build 5, ACTIVE, verify_jwt=false): autostart=false, monitorStream=false, autostop=false, DVR+recordFromStart on; pre-creates only. New Vault secret YOUTUBE_STREAM_KEYS_CACHE (8 categories, ingestionAddress+streamName) so the push path needs no live token. OAuth refresh token re-minted (oauthplayground, team@ creds, youtube scope, offline/consent) and stored to Vault; verified a 200 refresh exchange. `vyve-live-runner.py` written and syntax-clean ŌĆö stdlib+ffmpeg multi-session daemon for the always-on box (mint-if-missing with CAS, wait-to-airtime, push, poll-active, transition live, transition complete; --once/--dry-run/--date modes). Validated `~/vyve_rename.py` handed to Dean (deterministic riverside_-> clean-name rename, dry-run-first, no-clobber, never deletes; date-anchored suffix strip robust to display truncation; tested preview+go on a mirror folder).

**OAuth durability.** App was found ALREADY "In production" (not Testing) yet the refresh token had still died ŌĆö unverified app on the sensitive youtube scope can rotate regardless. Durable cures: Workspace Internal (needs the pending Workspace migration) or full verification. master ┬¦24 line "7-day expiry while in Testing" is now STALE. youtube-token-keepalive cannot fix refresh-token death (not inactivity-based). Backlog: daily refresh-probe -> Brevo alert.

**Content state.** The real 30-day schedule (4 slots/day, weekday-themed; talks one-off; Suicide-and-Men held for Phil ┬¦23.84; explainers->Mind) maps onto the ~74 masters in ~/Desktop/VYVE LIVES. Every movement/mind-practice slot has a file; 10/12 talks do; 3 gaps with no file: "Why I Founded VYVE", "Doing Hard Things", "Not Drinking Alcohol". The 192 calendar_occurrences placeholder rows are blank (no title/host/desc/file) and on different times+categories than this schedule -> they get rebuilt at wiring time.

**Live/replay surfaces.** 8 `*-live.html` read calendar_occurrences; 8 `*-rp.html` read replay_videos ŌĆö both wired. Open blocker: live pages gate LIVE on clock only; with worker-driven go-live a YouTube broadcast-status probe is needed so broadcast-live overrides the clock.

**Process note (raised by Dean).** Brain commits at session close record decisions well, but a fresh chat can read past them and re-derive/re-ask settled calls (happened this session ŌĆö re-asked for a schedule already locked under PM-437). Mitigations adopted: this CURRENT FRONT block pinned at top of master (read-first, continue-from), and intent to checkpoint-commit mid-session, not only at close.


## 2026-06-03 PM-438 ŌĆö 30-day free-trial membership model + trialŌåÆ┬Ż10/mo conversion (built end-to-end; live except Stripe webhook secret)

Lewis + Dean want a 30-day free trial: account fully usable for 30 days, then access stops and the member is walled + prompted to subscribe at ┬Ż10/mo permanent (vs the standard ┬Ż20 B2C) via the `VYVE10` ┬Ż10-off-FOREVER coupon on the ┬Ż20 product. Plus durable lifetime-free (`comp`) and corporate (`enterprise`) tags. Designed as ONE membership model, not three features.

**Schema (migration `add_membership_model_columns` + backfill).** `members` gained `account_type` text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'trial' CHECK in ('trial','paid','comp','enterprise'), `trial_started_at`, `trial_ends_at` (+ indexes). Reused the pre-existing `subscription_status` (default 'active') as the live gate flag ŌĆö left un-CHECK-constrained (┬¦23.78 deferral, audited write surfaces first). `members` already carried `stripe_customer_id`, `company`, `company_slug` (corporate scaffolding already present). Backfilled all 25 live members: 10 comp (Dean ├Ś3, Lewis, Calum, Alan, Vicki, Cole, Phil, Shannon), 1 paid (Paige), 2 enterprise (Kelly/Sage, Callum Budzinski/BT), 12 trial (each given a FRESH 30-day window so the cron never instantly expires the live cohort, ends ~2 Jul 2026). `test3@test.com` = standing expired fixture; test1/test2 = active-trial controls.

**Gate doctrine (now ┬¦23.85 HARD RULE).** Access iff `account_type IN ('comp','enterprise') OR subscription_status='active'`. comp/enterprise never expire; trials AND cancelled paid expire. Gate reads `subscription_status` (cron flag-flip), never request-time date math ŌĆö local-first/cacheable.

**Client gate + wall (vyve-site `bbe10c98` then `8f3384e`).** `auth.js` `vyveCheckAccess()` composed after `vyveCheckConsent` at the authoritative gate (same fail-open + sessionStorage-cache pattern; excluded on login/set-password/consent-gate/trial-ended) routes expired members to new `trial-ended.html` ŌĆö stay-signed-in, walled (not signed out) so post-payment return is frictionless. Wall is benefits-led (NO usage stats ŌĆö Dean's call, avoids embarrassing low-usage members; earlier mockup iterations went statsŌåÆbenefits-led), opens the conversion page in the EXTERNAL browser (Capacitor Browser plugin / window.open), passes `members.id` as `?cid=`. Gate refinement in `8f3384e`: removed unconditional 'paid' from the allow set so cancelled-paid is walled. vbb markers 317ŌåÆ319, sw `pm438-trial-ended-gate-a` then `pm438b-conversion-wiring-a` (index `#vbb-marker` + settings `#settings-vbb-marker` + sw CACHE_NAME bumped atomically each commit).

**Expiry cron (migration `add_expire_lapsed_trials_fn`).** `public.expire_lapsed_trials()` flips trial+active+past-`trial_ends_at` ŌåÆ expired. pg_cron jobid 34 `vyve-expire-trials`, daily 01:00 UTC. Verified flips exactly the right rows.

**Server-side write enforcement (migrations `membership_write_guard_expired_trials` ŌåÆ `membership_guard_broaden_to_any_expired`).** `public.assert_member_not_expired()` BEFORE INSERT trigger `aaa_membership_guard` (name forces it to fire first) on daily_habits/workouts/cardio/session_views ŌĆö RAISEs `membership_expired` for any `subscription_status='expired' AND account_type NOT IN ('comp','enterprise')`. Chosen over hand-redeploying the 400-line core EFs (member-dashboard v71, log-activity v36 ŌĆö both inspected) to add a guard: transcription risk too high vs the live-site client gate already covering the whole cohort. Verified via rolled-back probes: expired-trial blocked, cancelled-paid blocked, active passes.

**Conversion leg.** `public.convert_member_to_paid(uuid, customer)` ŌåÆ paid/active + stripe_customer_id; `public.mark_member_lapsed(uuid)` ŌåÆ expired (never comp/enterprise) ŌĆö migration `add_membership_conversion_fns`, both tested on test3 then fixture restored. `stripe-webhook` EF v1 deployed (verify_jwt:false; Stripe-Signature HMAC-SHA256 verified; fails safe 500 if `STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET` unset): `checkout.session.completed` ŌåÆ convert by `client_reference_id=members.id`; `customer.subscription.deleted` ŌåÆ lapse by `stripe_customer_id` lookup. URL `https://ixjfklpckgxrwjlfsaaz.supabase.co/functions/v1/stripe-webhook`. Marketing site (Test-Site-Finalv3) `continue.html` (`31e252c` created, `924e9bb` wired): branded interstitial, reads `?cid=`, prefills `VYVE10` + binds `client_reference_id`, redirects to the live ┬Ż10 Payment Link `https://buy.stripe.com/bJeeVe0Cs1Em53D5oh93y01` (appends `?prefilled_promo_code=VYVE10&client_reference_id=<cid>`). Coupon confirmed in dashboard: Fixed ┬Ż10.00 off, Duration FOREVER, applies to VYVE Health Membership (prod_UB9DfhMhdIFD6l). Conversion link's after-payment = default Stripe confirmation (NOT welcome.html).

**Compliance.** No in-app payment (App Store / Play Store IAP rules; UK steering not live until ~H1 2026 ŌĆö Apple/Google got CMA Strategic Market Status Oct 2025, first commitments 1 Apr 2026). Wall is neutral (no price/code in-app), all payment on web/external browser. Conversion link is a SEPARATE Payment Link from the ┬Ż20 new-signup link (`00wf...`, which redirects to welcome.html and has no returning-member detection ŌåÆ would clobber).

**Delivery-model correction (Dean):** members currently run off the LIVE site (server.url), NOT bundled ŌĆö so vyve-site commits are live for the whole cohort immediately, no OTA needed here. (Resolves the capacitor.config.json doctrine ambiguity in the live-loop direction for now.)

**Outstanding (Dean, Stripe dashboard) ŌĆö only thing between here and a closed loop:** register webhook endpoint + set `STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET`; confirm "Allow promotion codes" ON for the conversion link. Front half is live + device-testable now via test3 (wall ŌåÆ Subscribe ŌåÆ external browser ŌåÆ continue.html ŌåÆ ┬Ż10 checkout).

**Backlog spawned (see backlog.md):** read-path EF enforcement (member-dashboard); extend write-guard to mind_activities/movement_activities/connect_checkins/wellbeing_checkins/monthly_checkins; web "Start free trial" sign-up flow (inverts pay-first, not built); continue.html no-cid manual-reconcile path.

Sandbox egress blocks supabase.co so EFs could not be curl-tested from the container (device/dashboard test owned by Dean). ## 2026-06-02 PM-437 Simulated-live content schedule locked + 30-day calendar built; "Suicide and Men" gated on Phil

Decisions this session (live-content go-to-market ŌĆö no production code shipped yet, execution next session):
- **Delivery model:** simulated-live = self-hosted `ffmpeg -re` push of a pre-recorded master into the existing reusable YouTube stream keys (chosen over Castr: free, files already local, one command vs ~25 manual uploads). `simulated-live-worker.py` delivered (stdlib + ffmpeg; resolves occurrence->category->youtube_stream_id->liveStreams.list cdn ingest+key->waits until starts_at->pushes). Single-session; needs wrapping into a multi-session scheduler. Cannot run in an Edge Function (long-lived process).
- **Host:** prove on Dean's Mac with ONE test broadcast first, then move to an always-on ~GBP4/mo cloud box for unattended 30-day scheduling. Claude cannot broadcast/host video; Dean or the box runs the pushes.
- **Cadence 3-4/day:** 07:00 Movement (themed by weekday) / 08:30 Mind (themed) / 13:00 Movement booster (blended) / 19:30 Wind-down (restore). Tuesday mornings anchored to the Healthy/mobility series. Repetition accepted (library growing; Lewis producing fast).
- **Recyclability rule:** practice content recurs freely on recurring slots; talks air once then live on-demand in Replays.
- **Inventory (riverside_ masters, deduped):** 53 Movement + 21 Mind = 74 airable. Explainers (4) REMOVED from live rotation -> Mind-section intro content. Excluded: 3x background_5min loops; morning_stillness (classification pending Dean).
- **Lewis's new videos:** Doing Hard Things + Not Drinking Alcohol -> talk pool; Why I Founded VYVE -> launch feature / onboarding-about; Welcome to VYVE -> onboarding first-open. Only 5 of the stated 6 received (6th pending).
- **Suicide and Men: GATED** out of all rotation pending Phil clinical sign-off + on-asset crisis-support signposting -> new hard rule ┬¦23.84.
- **Pipeline verified live (not just brain):** `session-publish` v2 (hourly cron jobid 27) mints the liveBroadcast (unlisted, enableAutoStart, DVR), binds the category reusable stream, AND playlistItems.insert into the category playlist, writing youtube_broadcast_id back. `refresh-replay-videos` v2 (03:30 UTC) pulls the 8 playlists into replay_videos -> app Replays. Replays currently EMPTY (PM-410 wiped 33 test rows). RTMP key NOT in Supabase -> resolved live via YouTube Data API liveStreams.list(part=cdn). YouTube OAuth refresh token expires weekly while consent screen in Testing.
- **Go-live = two tracks:** (1) seed Replays NOW by uploading back-catalogue straight into the 8 category playlists (don't wait 30 days for lives); (2) run the 3-4/day live schedule on top for live/active credibility.
- **Deliverable:** vyve-30-day-live-schedule.md (Wed 3 Jun -> Thu 2 Jul 2026), every day/slot mapped to a session title.

Next (execution, fresh chat): Load Brain -> resolve a stream key live -> ONE Mac test push -> seed Replays from back-catalogue + wire calendar_occurrences for the month + wrap worker into a multi-session scheduler on the box.

## 2026-06-02 PM-436 Dexie wpc PK revert ŌĆö re-keying an existing store jammed the iOS upgrade and silently shimmed every v21 device to blank rings/habits/progress

Root cause: PM-425 (`fb5e91e9`, SCHEMA_V22) changed `workout_plan_cache` Dexie PK `member_email`ŌåÆ`id`. Changing a primary key forces Dexie to delete+recreate the object store inside the versionchange transaction; iOS/WKWebView mishandles delete-and-recreate-in-one-transaction, so `db.open()` rejects on any device already holding v21 data. db.js then falls through to the noop shim (`isEnabled()===false`), and every Dexie-backed surface ŌĆö the 5 home progress rings (`loadPillarCounts`), habits.html ŌĆö silently reads empty ŌåÆ 0/30 and "no habits assigned", while EF-backed surfaces (habit cards, Mind page) still paint. On-disk IDB version 210 = Dexie v21 (Dexie stores IDB version as schema├Ś10); device stuck at 210 because the 21ŌåÆ22 upgrade kept throwing. Surfaced on `deanonbrown2@gmail.com` (created 26 May); reproduced across an account switch to test1 ŌåÆ confirmed device-DB-scoped, not account-scoped. Fresh installs unaffected (clean create, no migration); only existing-data devices that pick up the v22 web change jam ŌåÆ full member blast radius, silent. "Worked last week" = device + code both on v21 until the v22 change went live (live web, not bundled ŌĆö instant on next load).

Diagnosis path (Safari Web Inspector on the WKWebView, via Mac): `VYVELocalDB.isEnabled()===false` + `hasStore:true` (= noop shim active) while all source tables + `member_home_state` were fully populated server-side and `activity_date` present on every row ŌåÆ ruled out data/logging/field-name. `indexedDB.open('vyve_local_db')` ŌåÆ `version=210 stores=57` (open fine at current, = Dexie v21). Only schema diff at v22 is the wpc PK change, no `.upgrade()` callback ŌåÆ identified the re-key as the failing upgrade.

Fix (vyve-site `e44b2357`, 4-file atomic, byte-verified at commit SHA): reverted SCHEMA_V22 `workout_plan_cache` to the v21 PK (`'member_email, is_active, generated_at'`). `db.version(22)` stays as a clean no-op bump so jammed v21 devices upgrade 210ŌåÆ220 with NO store recreate and self-heal on next open. Both read surfaces are surface-filtered + REST-fallback (`workouts-programme.js` L84-98; `movement.html fetchPlan` L838+), so one local wpc row per member is safe ŌĆö each page takes its Dexie row if it matches, else REST. sync.js left untouched (`select=*`; replaceForMember collapses to one row under member_email PK ŌĆö harmless). vbb 315ŌåÆ316, sw `pm436-wpc-pk-revert-a`, `node --check` passed on db.js+sw.js. Composio down throughout; Vault PAT + Git Data API multi-file (blobsŌåÆtreeŌåÆcommitŌåÆfast-forward), fresh-HEAD recheck before ref PATCH. Verified live on the member device: rings/progress/habits repopulated, instant updates restored, BOTH movement + workout plans display (REST fallback serving each surface independently ŌĆö no user-visible feature loss).

Cost: PM-425's multi-plan-local mirror is deferred ŌĆö movement plan reads from server via fallback instead of local cache (marginally slower first paint, no functional loss). Re-do via a NEW id-keyed store post-launch (┬¦23.83 + backlog Option B); never re-key the existing store.

New hard rule: ┬¦23.83 ŌĆö never re-key an existing Dexie store via a version bump. Prevention queued (backlog): graceful open-failure fallback so a future jam shows server counts not a silent 0 (also covers the separate PF-30 iOS "IndexedDB lost" pattern); `dexie_open_failed`/`dexie_idb_lost` PostHog alert.

## 2026-06-02 PM-435 certificates re-pillared onto the five Your Journey buckets + Journey tab reorder

Dean's call: certificates were issued off the OLD five activity tracks (habits/workouts/cardio/checkins/sessions; personas Architect/Warrior/Relentless/Elite/Explorer) read straight from `member_home_state.*_total`, while the Your Journey page (`engagement-v2.html`) Progress tab shows five DIFFERENT capped buckets. So a member could pile up mind sessions, movement and replays and earn nothing, and the cert counts never matched the numbers their own Journey page showed. Re-pillared certs to mirror the Journey buckets exactly ŌĆö same five tracks, the substantive change being workouts+cardio merge into Body and Connect/Mind broaden. (Dean explicitly steered FIVE Journey-aligned buckets, NOT the originally-planned three Mind/Body/Connect pillars ŌĆö the five-card Progress tab is the source of truth he pointed at, so habits + check-ins stay their own certs.)

Final track set (`activity_type`): **habits ┬Ę mind ┬Ę body ┬Ę connect ┬Ę checkins**. Body = workouts+cardio+movement_activities (2/day combined cap); Connect = connect_checkins+session_views+replay_video_views+session_live_views (2/day combined); Mind = mind_activities (2/day); Habits 1/day distinct days; Check-ins 1/week distinct ISO weeks ŌĆö IDENTICAL rules to engagement-v2 `renderProgressTab`. Personas: Architect (habits)/Warrior (body)/Explorer (connect)/Elite (checkins) kept; **Mind is the only new persona ŌĆö "The Anchor" placeholder pending Lewis sign-off** (he can also rename Warrior/Explorer for cleaner pillar-named certs; nothing blocks).

**Server (migration `pm434_certificates_repillar_to_journey_buckets` + EF deploy):**
- `certificates.pillar` text column; `activity_type` CHECK widened to 8 values (5 pillar + 3 legacy) ŌĆö strictly additive, no row violated (┬¦23.78 audit: only the EF + this migration write it).
- `public.get_certificate_buckets()` STABLE SECURITY DEFINER ŌĆö single source of the five capped buckets, mirrors the Journey page. Both the EF and the backfill consume it.
- Unique index `certificates_member_type_milestone_uniq (member_email, activity_type, milestone_count)` ŌĆö no dupes existed; makes issuance idempotent/race-safe.
- Silent backfill: pre-inserted each member's new-pillar certs up to current level (6 rows ŌĆö deanonbrown@hotmail body├Ś4+connect├Ś1, owenbarrett2 body├Ś1; habits already present), `charity_moment_triggered=true`, NO email (SQL path). Existing workouts/cardio/sessions certs tagged `pillar='legacy'`, preserved as history; cert display pages keep legacy entries so they still render.
- `certificate-checker` v24 (version 32 ACTIVE, verify_jwt:false preserved): reads `get_certificate_buckets()` rpc, issues per-30 per track with `pillar`, upsert ON CONFLICT ignoreDuplicates (race-safe), emails only on genuinely-new inserts. **Latent bug fixed:** v23 called `get_next_global_cert_number` which does NOT exist ŌåÆ supabase-js returned `{error}` and the `if(error) return 1` fallback numbered EVERY cert `1` (max global_cert_number was 2 across 9 certs). v24 calls the real `next_certificate_number()` (= `nextval('certificate_number_seq')`). Verified live via pg_net ŌåÆ `200`, `0 new certificates` (backfill covered current levels; full path exercised against the new buckets, no clobber, no email).

**Front-end (vyve-site `e1e5abff`, atomic 6-file, all md5-verified at SHA):**
- `certificate.html` + `certificates.html`: Body/Mind/Connect tracks added; legacy Exercise/Cardio/Sessions kept so historical certs still render. Split `TRACK_META` (5 pillar tracks ŌåÆ drives "progress to next" grid + Tracks-Unlocked stat) from `CERT_META` (= TRACK_META + legacy ŌåÆ drives earned-cert display). Grid computes the five capped buckets **Dexie-direct** (`computeJourneyBuckets`, ported from `renderProgressTab`) so the cert library numbers match the Journey page; buckets attached to the EF refresh + cache so counts aren't downgraded to the legacy progress shape.
- `engagement-v2.html`: Your Journey tab order now **Progress (default) / Score / Achievements**. Default-active pane flipped to `#tab-progress`; `renderProgressTab` fired on boot (no longer lazy-only) so Progress paints from Dexie on landing. Achievements deep-link unaffected (routes by `data-tab` click, position-independent).
- Build markers index+settings ŌåÆ **Update 315** (settings was drifted at 312 ŌĆö resynced); sw `vyve-cache-v2026-06-02-pm435-cert-repillar-journey-tabs-a`.

**Tooling.** Composio still down (~9 days) ŌĆö Vault PAT (`GITHUB_PAT_CLAUDE`) + Git Data API throughout (┬¦23.27). Supabase MCP apply_migration / deploy_edge_function / execute_sql / pg_net invoke. ┬¦23.21 fresh-HEAD re-checked before ref PATCH (64b1aaba unchanged, force:false). ┬¦23.24 cross-repo PM scan: vyve-site max 434, brain 434, capacitor 412 ŌåÆ PM-435 claimed. ┬¦23.30 md5-verify all 6 files at commit SHA ŌĆö match.

**┬¦23.82 (new candidate ŌĆö first occurrence).** A `supabase.rpc('fn')` to a non-existent Postgres function fails SILENTLY (returns `{error}`, no throw); a fallback returning a constant then masks the bug indefinitely ŌĆö see the v23 cert-number bug above. When wiring an EF to an RPC, confirm the function exists in `pg_proc`; any rpc-error fallback returning a constant is a candidate for hiding a missing-function bug. Companion (banked): when a value must match a client-side Dexie compute, express the rule ONCE as a server SQL function consumed by both EF and backfill, never re-derive.

**Still open (backlog):** certificate VISUAL DESIGN pass ŌĆö `certificate.html`/`certificates.html` are functionally correct but placeholder-quality, need a proper premium design (Dean flagged 2 Jun). Mind persona "The Anchor" pending Lewis. Goal-target re-pillaring (the non-cert half of PM-159) still open.

## 2026-05-30 PM-434 Apple Health re-prompt ŌĆö home banner now server-authoritative

The "returning user wasn't prompted for Apple Health" bug (Owen Barrett ŌĆö already had the old app, created 9 Apr, onboarding_complete=true, health_data_consent=false, never prompted, had to enable manually in Settings). Root cause is two-layered: the onboarding HK prompt lives in `consent-gate.html`, which `auth.js vyveCheckConsent` only routes brand-new members to (no `terms_accepted_at`, created <10 min ago). Returning members already have terms accepted ŌåÆ skip the gate ŌåÆ never see the HK questionnaire. The home-screen fallback banner (`index.html initHbReprompt`) is meant to catch them but had two faults:
 1. Single synchronous pass that could run BEFORE the bridge's `fetchDashboardAndHydrate` (fired on `vyveAuthReady`) set `__VYVE_HEALTH_FEATURE_ALLOWED__` / `__VYVE_HEALTH_CONNECTION_STATE__` ŌĆö so `isFeatureEnabled()` returned false and it bailed permanently (ready() only re-polls while `healthBridge` is absent, not while state is unhydrated).
 2. Suppressed on the persistent local `vyve_healthkit_has_connected` flag, which `hydrateFromDashboard` (healthbridge.js ~852) deliberately leaves set even when the server reports the member NOT connected on this platform ŌĆö so a stale flag from a prior app/install hides the banner forever.

Fix (PM-434, vyve-site `64b1aab`, 2-file atomic, byte-verified): `initHbReprompt` now mirrors the settings.html pattern ŌĆö `await window.healthBridge.ensureHydrated()` then decide off server-authoritative `window.__VYVE_HEALTH_CONNECTION_STATE__` ('connected' ŌåÆ suppress; 'none' ŌåÆ re-prompt regardless of stale local flag; undefined/hydration-failed ŌåÆ fall back to old local heuristic, no regression). 7-day dismiss cooldown (`vyve_healthkit_declined_at`) unchanged. Banner is native-iOS only. sw cache ŌåÆ `pm434-hk-reprompt-server-state-a`, vbb 313ŌåÆ314. node --check passed on the patched IIFE.

Scope/risk: NOT launch-blocking ŌĆö per active.md ┬¦0 all member data is wiped at launch and everyone re-onboards fresh (no terms_accepted_at ŌåÆ all hit the consent-gate ŌåÆ all get the proper prompt). This fix matters post-launch for re-installs, consent-revoked-then-wants-back, and any future migration. Web change ŌåÆ reaches members only on next OTA bundle (┬¦23.42); needs the standard on-device banner check at bundle cut (native-iOS-only behaviour, not verifiable in the dev container). Left consent-gate.html / vyveCheckConsent untouched deliberately ŌĆö keeping blast radius off the launch-critical new-member onboarding path. Composio still down; Vault PAT throughout.
## 2026-05-30 PM-433 cardio/workouts ŌĆö HealthKit cross-app duplicate guard (server-side, no OTA)

The cardio "double information" bug. `sync-health-data` promoted HK workouts to cardio/workouts via plain `.insert()` with no semantic dedupe ŌĆö every other table in the EF already upserts. The cardio table's only dedupe was `(member_email, client_id) WHERE client_id IS NOT NULL`, and HK rows carry `client_id=null`, so they had ZERO protection. Confirmed mechanism: Owen Barrett's runs are in HealthKit twice ŌĆö from Strava (49 samples) AND Garmin Connect (48) ŌĆö each app writes the same physical workout under its own `native_uuid`, so the samples-layer dedup `(member_email, source, native_uuid)` sees them as distinct ŌåÆ two promoted cardio rows. A native_uuid key cannot catch cross-app dupes; the real identity is member + source + type + start instant.

Fix (two layers):
- Migration `pm433_cardio_workouts_healthkit_dedupe_guard`: removed 48 existing HK cardio dupes (287ŌåÆ239 rows; Owen 97ŌåÆ49), then `CREATE UNIQUE INDEX cardio_member_source_type_loggedat_uniq (member_email, source, cardio_type, logged_at)` and `workouts_member_source_loggedat_uniq (member_email, source, logged_at)`. Pre-checked: 0 manual-row collisions, so indexes created clean; manual logging unaffected (also still guarded by client_id index). No FKs reference cardio/workouts so dedupe delete was safe.
- EF v17 (deployed, was v16): cardio/workouts promotion switched from `.insert()` to `.upsert(m.row, { onConflict, ignoreDuplicates:true })` via new `promotedConflictTarget()` helper. On conflict ŌåÆ DO NOTHING ŌåÆ empty data ŌåÆ existing code skips the promoted++ / sample-link, so no error, no double. weight_logs/samples/daily upserts unchanged.

Verified: post-fix HK dupes = 0; attempted duplicate insert on the semantic key was rejected by the unique index (Owen count held at 49). Server-side only ŌĆö reaches every member immediately, NO OTA needed. workouts had 0 dupes today (Owen's cross-app dupes are all cardio-type) but the same latent bug was guarded too.

Note: this is a HealthKit-pipeline architectural invariant ŌĆö master.md ┬¦6/┬¦7 should record sync-health-data ŌåÆ v17 and the new cardio/workouts dedupe keys on next master pass. Composio still down; Vault PAT + Supabase MCP (apply_migration/deploy_edge_function) throughout.

## 2026-05-30 PM-432 light mode ŌĆö mood panel white-on-light contrast fix

`index.html` mood panel (PM-285): the `[data-theme="light"] .mood-panel` override flipped only the container to a near-white surface (`rgba(255,255,255,0.72)`); every child colour was authored white-on-dark and never flipped ŌĆö `.mood-question`/`.mood-thanks-msg` (#fff), `.mood-label-row` (`--teal-lt`, sub-AA on white), `.mood-skip`/`.mood-label`/`.mood-icon` (translucent white), `.mood.selected .mood-label` (#fff). White-on-white / sub-AA in light mode ŌĆö and it's the most prominent element on the home screen. Added a `[data-theme="light"]` child-override block using semantic tokens (`--text` 16:1, `--text-muted` 6.9:1, `--text-faint`, `--teal` for label + selected-icon + thanks-tick).

Repo-wide light-mode audit (all 74 HTML pages; method = find components whose surface flips light, then check child text tokens): this was the ONLY true white-on-light contrast bug. Every other hardcoded-white text resolved to white-on-accent buttons, photo/gradient heroes (text-shadow), gradient tiles (`.calendar-tile` teal/gold), or always-dark screens (consent-gate, login/set-password, `.barcode-overlay` #000 camera view, reset-cache/hk-diagnostic debug pages). Components that DO flip to light (exercise `.hero-card`, index `.focus-card-tod-pill`, `.hero-next`) correctly use tokens or carry their own light overrides.

Ship `4dd7b23` (vyve-site, 2-file atomic, byte-verified at SHA): index.html (mood light block + vbb 312ŌåÆ313) + sw.js `pm431-locked-ramp-render-back-a` ŌåÆ `pm432-lightmode-mood-a`. CSS-only, no JS. Composio still down ŌĆö PAT-direct (Vault `GITHUB_PAT_CLAUDE`) throughout (┬¦23.45/┬¦23.27). Future light-mode work: the failure mode is always "container got a light override, children didn't" ŌĆö grep `[data-theme="light"]` surface flips and verify child text uses semantic tokens.

NOTE ŌĆö active.md ┬¦2 drift caught: ┬¦2 narrative top was PM-409 (26 May), live HEAD was PM-431. PM-410..431 are all in this changelog but were never spliced into the active.md working set. ┬¦2 needs a rebuild pass; PM-410..430 backfill deferred.

## 2026-05-28 PM-431 movement ŌĆö render locked-ramp plans (Foundation/Distance) + single back on detail

Twin of PM-429. Locked-ramp movement plans (Sedentary Reset/Foundation, Distance Builder) carry `weekly_targets` but NO `weeks`/`sessions`, so `renderPlan`'s structured path hit `if (!session) showNoPlan()` and switching to one showed the no-plan "Choose your plan" CTA instead of the plan ŌĆö looked like a Dexie delay but was a render bail (the new row WAS in Dexie instantly via the PM-427 mirror; the renderer threw it away). Fix: `renderPlan` now routes ANY sessionless movement plan (just_steps + locked_ramp) to the state-aware render (`applyMovementState`); only genuinely session-shaped legacy plans use the structured renderer. `applyMovementState` states 1/2 now populate + show the prog-card (Active Programme name, "Week X of Y", progress bar) like the workouts card; duplicate Week chip removed from `prog-target-row`. movement-plans.html: removed the in-page detail navbar ("Plan details" + back arrow) ŌĆö nav.js's sticky header back is the single back on detail view (was two).

Ship `326532d4` (vyve-site, 5-file atomic, md5-verified at SHA): movement.html + movement-plans.html + index/settings vbb 311ŌåÆ312 + sw.js `pm431-locked-ramp-render-back-a`. Composio still down ŌĆö PAT-direct Git Data API throughout (┬¦23.27).

**┬¦23.81 (new candidate ŌĆö first occurrence):** movement.html `renderPlan` must route by *shape presence*, not plan_type enumeration. Movement-surface plans created by the picker (`movement-plans.html startPlan`) carry `weekly_targets`/`prompt_pool` but never `weeks`/`sessions` ŌĆö the structured session renderer's `if (!session) showNoPlan()` silently discards them. Route on `!hasSessions` ŌåÆ state-aware layer. Earned twice now (PM-429 just_steps, PM-431 locked_ramp). Promotes to hard rule.

movement.html: `.modal-sheet` used `background:var(--surface)` which resolves to ~4% alpha (`--fill-subtle`) ŌĆö the Add-steps modal was translucent and the page bled straight through it (unreadable on device). Switched to a solid opaque panel (`#122e2e` dark, `#ffffff` light via `[data-theme="light"]` override); overlay deepened 0.72ŌåÆ0.82. movement-plans.html: detail CTA was hard-disabled whenever the plan was current, so a Just Steps member couldn't reopen to adjust their daily target ("you're already on this plan"). ## 2026-05-28 PM-429 movement.html ŌĆö render the active Just Steps plan (was bailing to no-plan) + name plan/target

Bug: `renderPlan()` read weeks/sessions from `programme_json` and hit `if (!session) showNoPlan()`. Just Steps plans have no sessions, so a member WITH an active Just Steps plan saw the no-plan "Choose your plan" CTA ŌĆö the chosen plan rendered as nothing. Fix: `renderPlan` routes `plan_type==='just_steps'` straight to the state-aware ring/target render (`applyMovementState`) and returns before the structured session path, hiding prog-card/session-card/no-plan. The state-3/4 ring + week-consistency UI (built PM-420) now actually fires. Plus: `applyMovementState` names the active plan + daily target in the page header for states 3/4 ("Your plan: Just Steps ┬Ę 9,500 steps/day"), mirroring how the workouts programme card names its plan; the existing Browse-plans button (states 1-4) is the change-plan affordance. (Generalised to all sessionless movement plans in PM-431.)

Ship `74e3cb6d` (vyve-site, 4-file atomic, md5-verified): movement.html + index/settings vbb 309ŌåÆ310 + sw.js `pm429-just-steps-render-a`.

"Big jump" banner above 1.3├Ś baseline stays a warning; cap banner at the ceiling ŌĆö not a hard wall below 10k. 4-file: index/settings vbb 308ŌåÆ309, sw.js `pm428-step-baseline-slider-a`.

## 2026-05-28 PM-426 Movement V2 polish-and-fix ŌĆö theme.css, nav chrome, cache-first picker, Just Steps start fix

The Movement V2 pages were shipped mockup-first without the full portal-page treatment. Fixes: **theme** ŌĆö movement-plans.html had ZERO theme.css links (every token undefined ŌåÆ light/broken render); linked `/theme.css` + hoisted theme.js synchronous (no defer, ┬¦23.6); movement.html theme.js de-deferred + hoisted (theme-flash fix). No inline `:root` (would shadow theme.css per mind.html doctrine). **nav/chrome** ŌĆö movement-plans.html: added nav.js + db.js + bus.js, mobile safe-area top padding, removed redundant library-view navbar (nav.js sticky header replaces it, ┬¦23.57). **cache-first picker** ŌĆö paint from a localStorage bundle (`vyve_movement_plans_cache`, 24h TTL, email-guarded) + active-plan marker read from the PM-425 Dexie wpc mirror; background authoritative refresh. **Just Steps start fix (the real break):** `workout_plan_cache.plan_duration_weeks` is NOT NULL; Just Steps sent `null` ŌåÆ 400 ŌåÆ "Try again". Fixed with **sentinel `0`** (= endless; week card hidden for Just Steps states 3-4 so no Week-X-of-N math; no schema change ŌĆö chose this over making the column nullable to avoid null-guard sprawl + DDL risk). **┬¦23.32** stamp: `id: clientId` on the wpc POST (no `client_id` column on wpc; `id` is the dedupe key) so the Dexie row (PK `id` post-PM-425) keys to the server row.
